order_status.description: Checking the status, shipment, tracking, or delivery state of an existing order, or modifying/canceling a recently placed order.
examples: Where is my order?
Has my package shipped yet?
Can I get the tracking number for my order?
My order hasn't arrived, where is it?
Check the status of order number 12345
Is my delivery delayed?
Can I modify my shipping address 30 minutes after ordering?
How do I cancel my order before it ships?
Is it too late to change my order?
Can I cancel or modify my order after placement?

product_inquiry.description: Questions about product details, specifications, refurbished grades, battery health, hardware warranty coverage, or compatibility.
examples: Is this refurbished phone Grade A or B?
What is the battery health of Grade B items?
What does the 12-month manufacturer warranty cover?
Does the standard warranty cover water damage?
Is this charger compatible with VibePhone 13 Pro?
What accessories are included in Grade C refurbished items?
I want a refurbished device with at least 90% battery health and original box, what grade should I get?
Can you compare the specifications of Grade A and Grade B refurbished electronics?
Does the warranty cover drops and physical damage?

returns_refunds.description: Questions regarding return policies, restocking fees, return windows, starting a return, or checking refund status.
examples: How do I return an item I bought?
When will I get my refund?
What is your return policy?
Can I exchange this for a different size?
Where do I send my return package?
What is the restocking fee for returned open-box electronics?
Do I have to pay a restocking fee if the item is defective?
How long do I have to return an item?
I want to return a laptop and some accessories, how much restocking fees will I have to pay?
How is the restocking fee calculated for open box items?

payment_billing.description: Questions about payment methods, billing statements, loyalty points redemption, gift card terms, and store credit expiration.
examples: Why was I charged twice for my purchase?
What payment methods do you accept?
Can I redeem my loyalty points for cash?
Do my loyalty points expire?
How many loyalty points do I earn per dollar spent?
Can I use a gift card and store credit together?
Do gift cards expire?
How long does promotional store credit last?
My card was declined, what should I do?

account_login.description: Issues with logging in, creating an account, updating profile security, setting up multi-factor authentication (MFA), or password resets.
examples: I can't log in to my account.
How do I reset my password?
How do I update my shipping address in my profile?
How do I set up multi-factor authentication?
Can I enable MFA for my account?
I forgot my password, please help.

shipping_delivery.description: General questions about shipping options, delivery times, weight tiers, international shipping, customs duties, or shipping fees.
examples: Do you ship internationally?
How much does shipping cost?
How long does standard shipping take?
Can I get overnight shipping?
How much does express shipping cost for a 5 lb package?
What is the standard shipping rate for Tier 1?
Do you deliver to Canada or the UK?
Are there custom duties for orders sent to the European Union?
I am ordering a 15 lb package and need it tomorrow, how much will overnight shipping cost?
